WINDOW: 1385.800s to 1423.533s (smile at 1405.800s to 1408.533s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[1370.660-1477.560] interviewee: And he smiles. He said you know, I know your father very well. Your father came in 1915 to Breslau, to Wroclaw, now Poland, to be checked if he is well enough to go to the army, to the Austrian Army, because we were Austrians, you see? And he said, I remember him. From '15 to '39, he remembered the name of my father. What do you want? I explained to him. He gave me a permit that I am working
